reviews.text:
I am looking forward to my next visit!
Karina, Blake & Akiko always takes care of us - they are a joy and make it a fun spot at Local Public Eatery and an easy place to loose the pressures of the busy city.
Akiko and Ben were awesome! Super friendly and made the night better with how personable they were.
Elaiza and Akiko were amazing. Food and atmosphere was very enjoyable. Will go back for sure
My niece and I had the most fun being served by Elaiza and Akiko. Food & drinks were great but our servers were even better! We'll be back.

Truly a local treasure.  Elaiza and Akiko made this experience what it was. While the drinks and food were delicious the servers and management made it so special. If you dine here make a special request for Elaiza and Akiko, you won’t regret it!

Always a great time
Karina is the best!!
Karina is the reason I come back! My drink is never empty!!

I am looking forward to my next visit!
Karina, Blake & Akiko always takes care of us - they are a joy and make it a fun spot at Local Public Eatery and an easy place to loose the pressures of the busy city.
Amazing food and atmosphere, Karina and Christina were amazing very friendly and great service. They do their job very well!
Food and atmosphere was great, Karina and Christina helped make the occasion even better.
Amazing food and atmosphere, Karina and Christina were amazing very friendly and great service. They do their job very well!
Food and atmosphere was great, Karina and Christina helped make the occasion even better.
Meklit was great
Meklit was amazing, especially since we were a large group.  Very nice smile and professional!
Fantastic service and remembered our names! Meklit. Definitely recommend
Meklit was absolutely amazing! Great service!
Ewan perfect service 👌
Akiko and Ben were awesome! Super friendly and made the night better with how personable they were.
Danielle provided us with excellent service, and made our evening special. Thanks for the great food, and the awesome drinks! Will be back:)
We come often to this place, and is fantastic. The food (specially the nachos) are great, good beer selection, and the service is always outstanding. Thanks, Eli, for kepping it up today for us!
Kalypsa was our server and she was amazing!!! We had such a great time here! The drinks were great and the apps were amazing!! Kalypsa was so attentive and sweet! Best experience ever!
Elaiza and Akiko were amazing. Food and atmosphere was very enjoyable. Will go back for sure
My niece and I had the most fun being served by Elaiza and Akiko. Food & drinks were great but our servers were even better! We'll be back.

Truly a local treasure.  Elaiza and Akiko made this experience what it was. While the drinks and food were delicious the servers and management made it so special. If you dine here make a special request for Elaiza and Akiko, you won’t regret it!
